title: Recipe for Disaster: Freeing the Lumbridge Sage

startPoint.en: Inspect the Lumbridge Sage in the banquet hall in Lumbridge Castle.
startPoint.es: Inspecciona al Lumbridge Sage en el salón de banquetes del Lumbridge Castle.

quests.title: Recipe for Disaster: Another Cook's Quest

chatOptions: 1 Yes, I'm sure I can make a cake.

text.en: Head to the 3rd floor of the Wizards' Tower and talk to Wizard Traiborn who is west of the beam.
text.es: Dirígete a la 3ª planta del Wizards' Tower y habla con Wizard Traiborn, que está al oeste del haz de luz.

text.en: Talk to Traiborn again for the first quiz.
text.es: Habla de nuevo con Traiborn para el primer cuestionario.

text.en: Talk to Traiborn again for the second quiz.
text.es: Habla de nuevo con Traiborn para el segundo cuestionario.

rows: What is the Defence level requirement to wear a Mystic Hat?
What doesn't lie between Morytania and Asgarnia?
What is the nearest guild to the Fishing Platform (as the seagull flies)?
What is the name of the toy seller in Draynor Village?

Take the number of Fire Runes requires to cast Fire Strike, and multiply by the number by the number of Air Runes used to cast Air Strike before adding the number of Earth Runes used to cast Earth Wave. What do you get?
The combat level of unarmed goblins near Lumbridge is:
If I'm going to need glass, first I will need:
Sand, bucket, soda ash, glass blowing pipe
A gold ring is to 5 as a holy symbol is to...
A glass vial is to 33, as a glass orb is to...
What ingredients are used in a cake?
I can hear howling in one direction and buzzing in the other - where am I?
I'm in a bar west of Pollnivneach. Where am I?
Which tower is closest to the Crafting Guild?
GP to bribe an Al Kharid gate guard<!-- Unable to get verbatim text as it appears in game due to a bug that causes the dialogue to be forced closed when this question is called. -->

text.en: Talk to Traiborn for the final quiz.
text.es: Habla con Traiborn para el cuestionario final.

rows: Which item began with the letter "m"?
How many weapons were you shown?
Which items were amongst those you were shown?
Guthix Prayer Book, Magic Logs, Pike
Which of the following items were NOT shown to you?
How many types of rune were there?

text.en: After completing his final quiz, you receive an enchanted egg, a bucket of enchanted milk and pot of enchanted flour.
text.es: Tras completar su último cuestionario, recibirás un huevo encantado, un cubo de leche encantada y una olla de harina encantada.

text.en: Use any of the raw ingredients on a cake tin.
text.es: Usa cualquiera de los ingredientes en crudo en un cake tin.

text.en: Bake the raw guide cake on a range.
text.es: Hornea la raw guide cake en un horno.

text.en: Use the cake of guidance on the Lumbridge Sage back in Lumbridge.
text.es: Usa la cake of guidance en el Lumbridge Sage de vuelta en Lumbridge.
